# Tasks: Example Task Manager

## Phase 1: Setup
- [ ] T001 Create project structure with a src/ and tests/ layout for the task manager
- [ ] T002 Initialize the project with its web framework and database dependencies

## Phase 2: Core
- [ ] T003 Implement the Task model with title and completed fields in src/models/task.py
- [ ] T004 Implement the task creation endpoint with validation in src/api/tasks.py
- [ ] T005 Implement the task completion endpoint in src/api/tasks.py
- [ ] T006 Implement persistence layer storing tasks in the database in src/storage/repo.py

## Phase 3: Polish
- [ ] T007 Add integration tests for the create/complete flow in tests/integration/test_tasks.py
